headline: Business looking up inside Bakersfield's office market
summary: A pattern repeats itself along Bakersfield’s California Avenue professional services corridor west of downtown: Building after building has signs out front advertising space for lease. The scene would appear to confirm predictions the office market would experience a lasting, post-pandemic downturn as pajama-clad employees put in most if not all their workdays from home, showing up only on ...
